name: Tide & Time
description: Tide & Time is coastal Britain with the volume turned down and the flavor turned up. Brines, cures, and gentle ferments sit under everything, clean and steady. Sea greens meet warm crumb and a touch of smoke. You taste a spoon of something ocean bright, break fresh bread, and hear why the calendar is Oliver’s sous-chef. It is unfussy, precise, and very comforting. Oliver grew up on the Cornish coast where dinner often depended on the tide. His father taught him to pickle and cure so nothing went to waste and a neighbor showed him how sea herbs can taste like a good day. He still swims year-round to clear his head. This menu celebrates patience and the kind of flavor you only get by waiting. Menu revealed at the table. Dietary adaptations with 72 hours’ notice.
